---
description: Documentation and blueprint integrity rules
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md"
---

- Preserve source citations, volume/chapter numbering, and requirement IDs.
- Distinguish blueprint requirement, current implementation, proposed
  interpretation, unresolved decision, and future scope.
- Do not silently reconcile contradictions.
- Do not claim implementation or test results without evidence.
- Keep compact context files concise and link back to original source sections.
- Public content ideas must come from real decisions, work, errors, lessons,
  experiments, or verified outcomes.
